<content>1: """Tests for the secrets_vault module - HashiCorp Vault adapter.
2: 
3: These tests use mocks to avoid requiring a real Vault server.
4: """
5: import os
6: import sys
7: import unittest
8: from unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock, Mock
9: 
10: # Mock hvac before any imports
11: sys.modules['hvac'] = MagicMock()
12: 
13: # Add the src directory to the path
14: sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '..', 'src'))
15: 
16: # Import after mocking hvac
17: from khoj.utils.secrets import LdapSecretError
18: from khoj.utils.secrets_vault import (
19:     VaultAdapter,
20:     is_vault_configured,
21:     get_ldap_credentials_from_vault,
22:     HVAC_AVAILABLE,
23: )
24: 
25: 
26: class TestModuleImport(unittest.TestCase):
27:     """Test that the module imports without errors."""
28: 
29:     def test_module_has_required_attributes(self):
30:         """Verify the secrets_vault module has all required attributes."""
31:         import khoj.utils.secrets_vault as vault_module
32:         self.assertTrue(hasattr(vault_module, 'VaultAdapter'))
33:         self.assertTrue(hasattr(vault_module, 'is_vault_configured'))
34:         self.assertTrue(hasattr(vault_module, 'get_ldap_credentials_from_vault'))
35:         self.assertTrue(hasattr(vault_module, 'LdapSecretError'))
36:         self.assertTrue(hasattr(vault_module, 'HVAC_AVAILABLE'))
37: 
38:     def test_hvac_available_is_true_when_mocked(self):
39:         """Verify HVAC_AVAILABLE is True when hvac is mocked."""
40:         self.assertTrue(HVAC_AVAILABLE)
41:

43: class TestIsVaultConfigured(unittest.TestCase):
44:     """Test is_vault_configured function."""
45: 
46:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {}, clear=True)
47:     def test_returns_false_when_no_env_vars_set(self):
48:         """Test that False is returned when no Vault env vars are set."""
49:         result = is_vault_configured()
50:         self.assertFalse(result)
51: 
52:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {"KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200"}, clear=True)
53:     def test_returns_false_when_only_addr_set(self):
54:         """Test that False is returned when only KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR is set."""
55:         result = is_vault_configured()
56:         self.assertFalse(result)
57: 
58:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {"KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token"}, clear=True)
59:     def test_returns_false_when_only_token_set(self):
60:         """Test that False is returned when only KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN is set."""
61:         result = is_vault_configured()
62:         self.assertFalse(result)
63: 
64:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {"KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": "secret/data/khoj/ldap"}, clear=True)
65:     def test_returns_false_when_only_path_set(self):
66:         """Test that False is returned when only KHOJ_VAULT_PATH is set."""
67:         result = is_vault_configured()
68:         self.assertFalse(result)
69: 
70:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
71:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
72:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token"
73:     }, clear=True)
74:     def test_returns_false_when_only_addr_and_token_set(self):
75:         """Test that False is returned when only addr and token are set."""
76:         result = is_vault_configured()
77:         self.assertFalse(result)
78: 
79:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
80:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
81:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token",
82:         "KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": "secret/data/khoj/ldap"
83:     }, clear=True)
84:     def test_returns_true_when_all_required_env_vars_set(self):
85:         """Test that True is returned when all required Vault env vars are set."""
86:         result = is_vault_configured()
87:         self.assertTrue(result)
88: 
89:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
90:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "",
91:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token",
92:         "KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": "secret/data/khoj/ldap"
93:     }, clear=True)
94:     def test_returns_false_when_addr_is_empty(self):
95:         """Test that False is returned when KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR is empty string."""
96:         result = is_vault_configured()
97:         self.assertFalse(result)
98: 
99:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
100:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
101:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "",
102:         "KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": "secret/data/khoj/ldap"
103:     }, clear=True)
104:     def test_returns_false_when_token_is_empty(self):
105:         """Test that False is returned when KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN is empty string."""
106:         result = is_vault_configured()
107:         self.assertFalse(result)
108: 
109:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
110:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
111:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token",
112:         "KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": ""
113:     }, clear=True)
114:     def test_returns_false_when_path_is_empty(self):
115:         """Test that False is returned when KHOJ_VAULT_PATH is empty string."""
116:         result = is_vault_configured()
117:         self.assertFalse(result)

120: class TestVaultAdapterInit(unittest.TestCase):
121:     """Test VaultAdapter initialization."""
122: 
123:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {}, clear=True)
124:     def test_raises_error_when_env_vars_not_set(self):
125:         """Test that LdapSecretError is raised when Vault env vars are not set."""
126:         with self.assertRaises(LdapSecretError) as context:
127:             VaultAdapter()
128:         self.assertIn("vault configuration incomplete", str(context.exception).lower())
129: 
130:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {"KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200"}, clear=True)
131:     def test_raises_error_when_vault_token_not_set(self):
132:         """Test that LdapSecretError is raised when KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN is not set."""
133:         with self.assertRaises(LdapSecretError) as context:
134:             VaultAdapter()
135:         self.assertIn("vault configuration incomplete", str(context.exception).lower())
136: 
137:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
138:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
139:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token"
140:     }, clear=True)
141:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.hvac.Client')
142:     def test_initializes_client_when_env_vars_set(self, mock_client_class):
143:         """Test that Vault client is initialized when env vars are set."""
144:         mock_client = MagicMock()
145:         mock_client.is_authenticated.return_value = True
146:         mock_client_class.return_value = mock_client
147:         
148:         adapter = VaultAdapter()
149:         
150:         mock_client_class.assert_called_once_with(
151:             url="http://vault:8200",
152:             token="test-token"
153:         )
154:         self.assertEqual(adapter.client, mock_client)
155: 
156:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
157:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
158:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token"
159:     }, clear=True)
160:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.hvac.Client')
161:     def test_raises_error_when_authentication_fails(self, mock_client_class):
162:         """Test that LdapSecretError is raised when Vault authentication fails."""
163:         mock_client = MagicMock()
164:         mock_client.is_authenticated.return_value = False
165:         mock_client_class.return_value = mock_client
166:         
167:         with self.assertRaises(LdapSecretError) as context:
168:             VaultAdapter()
169:         self.assertIn("authentication failed", str(context.exception).lower())
170: 
171:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
172:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
173:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token"
174:     }, clear=True)
175:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.hvac.Client')
176:     def test_raises_error_when_client_creation_fails(self, mock_client_class):
177:         """Test that LdapSecretError is raised when client creation fails."""
178:         mock_client_class.side_effect = Exception("Connection refused")
179:         
180:         with self.assertRaises(LdapSecretError) as context:
181:             VaultAdapter()
182:         self.assertIn("failed to connect", str(context.exception).lower())
183: 
184:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
185:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
186:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token",
187:         "KHOJ_VAULT_CACHE_TTL": "600"
188:     }, clear=True)
189:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.hvac.Client')
190:     def test_uses_custom_cache_ttl_from_env(self, mock_client_class):
191:         """Test that custom cache TTL is read from environment."""
192:         mock_client = MagicMock()
193:         mock_client.is_authenticated.return_value = True
194:         mock_client_class.return_value = mock_client
195:         
196:         adapter = VaultAdapter()
197:         
198:         self.assertEqual(adapter._cache_ttl, 600)

333: class TestVaultAdapterCaching(unittest.TestCase):
334:     """Test VaultAdapter caching behavior."""
335: 
336:     def setUp(self):
337:         """Set up test fixtures."""
338:         self.mock_client = MagicMock()
339:         self.mock_response = {
340:             "data": {
341:                 "data": {
342:                     "bind_dn": "CN=service,DC=example,DC=com",
343:                     "bind_password": "secret_password_123"
344:                 }
345:             }
346:         }
347:         self.mock_client.secrets.kv.v2.read_secret_version.return_value = self.mock_response
348:         self.mock_client.is_authenticated.return_value = True
349: 
350:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
351:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
352:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token",
353:         "KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": "secret/data/khoj/ldap"
354:     }, clear=True)
355:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.hvac.Client')
356:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.time.time')
357:     def test_uses_cache_when_valid(self, mock_time, mock_client_class):
358:         """Test that cached credentials are returned when cache is valid."""
359:         mock_client_class.return_value = self.mock_client
360:         mock_time.return_value = 1000.0
361:         
362:         adapter = VaultAdapter()
363:         
364:         # First call - should read from Vault
365:         adapter.get_ldap_credentials()
366:         self.assertEqual(self.mock_client.secrets.kv.v2.read_secret_version.call_count, 1)
367:         
368:         # Second call - should use cache
369:         mock_time.return_value = 1100.0  # 100 seconds later (within default 300s TTL)
370:         adapter.get_ldap_credentials()
371:         self.assertEqual(self.mock_client.secrets.kv.v2.read_secret_version.call_count, 1)
372: 
373:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
374:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
375:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token",
376:         "KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": "secret/data/khoj/ldap"
377:     }, clear=True)
378:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.hvac.Client')
379:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.time.time')
380:     def test_refreshes_cache_when_expired(self, mock_time, mock_client_class):
381:         """Test that Vault is called again when cache is expired."""
382:         mock_client_class.return_value = self.mock_client
383:         mock_time.return_value = 1000.0
384:         
385:         adapter = VaultAdapter()
386:         
387:         # First call - should read from Vault
388:         adapter.get_ldap_credentials()
389:         self.assertEqual(self.mock_client.secrets.kv.v2.read_secret_version.call_count, 1)
390:         
391:         # Second call after cache expiry - should read from Vault again
392:         mock_time.return_value = 1500.0  # 500 seconds later (beyond default 300s TTL)
393:         adapter.get_ldap_credentials()
394:         self.assertEqual(self.mock_client.secrets.kv.v2.read_secret_version.call_count, 2)
395: 
396:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
397:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
398:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token",
399:         "KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": "secret/data/khoj/ldap"
400:     }, clear=True)
401:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.hvac.Client')
402:     def test_clear_cache_empties_cache(self, mock_client_class):
403:         """Test that clear_cache empties the cache."""
404:         mock_client_class.return_value = self.mock_client
405:         
406:         adapter = VaultAdapter()
407:         
408:         # First call to populate cache
409:         adapter.get_ldap_credentials()
410:         self.assertTrue(adapter._cache)
411:         
412:         # Clear cache
413:         adapter.clear_cache()
414:         self.assertFalse(adapter._cache)
415:         self.assertEqual(adapter._cache_timestamp, 0)
416:

418: class TestVaultAdapterLogging(unittest.TestCase):
419:     """Test that no secrets are logged by VaultAdapter."""
420: 
421:     def setUp(self):
422:         """Set up test fixtures."""
423:         self.mock_client = MagicMock()
424:         self.mock_response = {
425:             "data": {
426:                 "data": {
427:                     "bind_dn": "CN=service,DC=example,DC=com",
428:                     "bind_password": "secret_password_123"
429:                 }
430:             }
431:         }
432:         self.mock_client.secrets.kv.v2.read_secret_version.return_value = self.mock_response
433:         self.mock_client.is_authenticated.return_value = True
434: 
435:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
436:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
437:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token",
438:         "KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": "secret/data/khoj/ldap"
439:     }, clear=True)
440:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.hvac.Client')
441:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.logger')
442:     def test_debug_logs_do_not_contain_password(self, mock_logger, mock_client_class):
443:         """Test that debug log messages don't contain the password."""
444:         mock_client_class.return_value = self.mock_client
445:         
446:         adapter = VaultAdapter()
447:         adapter.get_ldap_credentials()
448:         
449:         # Check that debug logs were called
450:         debug_calls = [call for call in mock_logger.debug.call_args_list]
451:         self.assertTrue(len(debug_calls) > 0)
452:         
453:         # Verify no log message contains the actual password
454:         for call in mock_logger.debug.call_args_list:
455:             log_message = str(call)
456:             self.assertNotIn("secret_password_123", log_message)
457: 
458:     @patch.dict(os.environ, {
459:         "KHOJ_VAULT_ADDR": "http://vault:8200",
460:         "KHOJ_VAULT_TOKEN": "test-token",
461:         "KHOJ_VAULT_PATH": "secret/data/khoj/ldap"
462:     }, clear=True)
463:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.hvac.Client')
464:     @patch('khoj.utils.secrets_vault.logger')
465:     def test_error_logs_do_not_contain_password(self, mock_logger, mock_client_class):
466:         """Test that error log messages don't contain the password."""
467:         self.mock_client.secrets.kv.v2.read_secret_version.side_effect = Exception("Permission denied")
468:         mock_client_class.return_value = self.mock_client
469:         
470:         adapter = VaultAdapter()
471:         with self.assertRaises(LdapSecretError):
472:             adapter.get_ldap_credentials()
473:         
474:         # Check that error was logged
475:         mock_logger.error.assert_called()
476:         
477:         # Verify no log message contains the password
478:         for call in mock_logger.error.call_args_list:
479:             log_message = str(call)
480:             self.assertNotIn("secret_password_123", log_message)

483: class TestGetLdapCredentialsFromVault(unittest.TestCase):
484:     """Test get_ldap_credentials_from_vault convenience function."""
485: 
486:     def setUp(self):
487:         """Set up test fixtures."""
488:         self.mock_client = MagicMock()
489:         self.mock_response = {
490:             "data": {
491:                 "data": {
492:                     "bind_dn": "CN=service,DC=example,DC=com",
493:                     "bind_password": "secret_password_123"
494:                 }
495:             }
496:         }
497:         self.mock_client.secrets.kv.v2.read_secret_version.return_value = self.mock_response
498:         self.mock_client.is_authenticated.return_value = True
499:
